narrative:
Granville Village B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,269 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
